assertions.assertion: Response explains that third-party authentication handlers need NuGet package updates for the new .NET version
assertions.rationale: States 'you'll need to update their NuGet packages to be compatible with the new .NET version'.

assertions.assertion: Response specifically mentions WS-Federation handler needing an update
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section on WS-Federation with mention of updating to .NET 8 compatible version.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions SAML2P handler (Sustainsys.Saml2 or equivalent) needing a compatible version for .NET 8+
Response recommends testing all external login flows end-to-end after migration
assertions.rationale: States 'make sure to test all your external login flows to ensure they still work correctly'.
